---
title: "Offer Letter Request"
---

Use the form below (or the button) to submit an offer letter request for a new or existing graduate student.
The form will notify the Graduate Program Coordinator and relevant staff once submitted.

[Submit Offer Letter Request](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe0q-LN2kvyNy2Nl7FwMs0C140NnxNQKsWq1M8S4VjGG4QniQ/viewform){.btn .btn-primary}

## What to Prepare

Before filling out the form, have the following information ready:

- **Student name** — full legal name for new admits, or select from the dropdown for existing students
- **Degree program** — MS or PhD
- **Funding sources and cost objects** — one per line, separated by `|`
- **Annual salary / stipend amount**
- **Funding breakdown by cost object**
- **Funding start and end dates**
- **Years of secured funding**
- **Funding plan beyond the secured period** (new students only, if fewer than 4 years secured)

## After Submission

Once the form is submitted:

1. An email summary is sent to the Graduate Program Coordinator and staff.
2. The offer letter is generated and shared with you.

For questions, contact the Graduate Committee Chair at [tmieno2@nebraska.edu](mailto:tmieno2@nebraska.edu).
